title: Professional Experience
subtitle: A summary of the experiences that have shaped my journey as a developer, always driven by continuous learning, technical improvement, and a commitment to delivering practical, high-quality solutions.

list.description: Studying modern web app technologies with React and Spring.
list.tasks: My first contact with the professional environment was at ML Software House, where I learned from experienced professionals and dove into the fundamentals of web development. Although my role was more focused on hands-on learning than on critical tasks, that period was essential to building my technical foundation and understanding real-world projects.
details: Actively participated in an internship program focused on the development of modern web applications, with practical guidance on agile methodologies and good programming practices.
Developed reusable user interface (UI) components using React, JavaScript, and JSX, actively collaborating in structuring the application's front-end.
Assisted in the development and maintenance of RESTful APIs in the Back-End using Java (Spring Boot), ensuring 100% data integration with relational databases (MySQL).
Made visual adjustments and punctual bug fixes, applying incremental improvements that ensured the integrity and quality of the user experience.
Experienced the technical routine of an agile team (via Trello), absorbing good architectural practices and clean code by shadowing senior developers and participating in code reviews.
Applied fundamental concepts in practice, using Git/GitHub for collaborative code versioning and gaining familiarity with automated testing pipelines and CI/CD.

list.company: Federal Institute of Southern Minas — Machado Campus
list.description: Maintenance and updates of the campus institutional portal.
list.tasks: This internship was a turning point in my path. For the first time, I faced a setting with real demands, deadlines, and direct impact on users. I worked on maintaining and improving the institutional portal, learning Joomla from scratch — a widely used CMS for building and managing dynamic websites with customizable modules and extensions — while handling important technical responsibilities.
details: Managed 100% of the maintenance and updating of the campus's institutional portal (Joomla/PHP), directly impacting access to information for a community of 19,795 students and staff.
Assumed full technical autonomy as the main person responsible for the website during the internship period, leading the resolution of daily calls and demands.
Optimized the user experience (UX) by making layout adjustments, restructuring informational sections, and updating content, reducing friction in portal navigation.
Quickly and self-taught mastered the Joomla ecosystem, implementing and managing extensions, modules, templates, and user permission control.

list.description: Technical lead for web projects using React, PHP, and Firebase.
list.tasks: During my time at MZZI, I worked with full autonomy on web systems from concept to delivery. Each project brought new technical and creative challenges, where I could experiment, learn, and propose solutions that truly impacted the client.
details: Worked as a contracted web developer on a project basis, being the sole technical lead (with 100% autonomous performance) for the development and maintenance of 10 corporate systems.
Led 100% of the stages of these projects: from requirements gathering to development, testing, deployment, and support.
Developed over 60 dynamic screens and interfaces, ensuring responsiveness and switching between React and PHP on the front-end according to each client's demands.
Used Firebase for authentication, notifications, and hosting, managing traffic and the security of critical data for daily operations.
Implemented secure authentication systems (OAuth), session management with cookies and caching strategies, improving performance and reducing loading time by approximately 30%.
Worked focusing on performance optimization, usability, and user experience (UX/UI).
Performed tests, bug fixes, and continuous updates, ensuring stability with rigorous code versioning in Git/GitHub.
Conducted all tasks autonomously, demonstrating proactivity, organization, and mastery of the tools used.
